milestones.focus: Vendors, Groups, and the B2B Network
actions: Secure 2-3 Solar Installers (Lead Buyers) on a Pay-Per-Close model (Zero risk for you).
Join 50+ local community Facebook and Nextdoor groups.
Pitch 30 Real Estate Agents on a Joint Venture (JV) revenue share.
Execute 'Value First' educational posts in 10 FB groups daily.
Direct Message (DM) users complaining about utility bills.
Pitch Roofers and Mortgage Brokers for JV partnerships.
Cold call 50 local businesses for commercial solar (High ticket).
Follow up with all JV partners for their client lists.
Hand off first 15-20 organically generated leads to vendors.
Chase vendors daily for status on handed-off leads.
Launch 'Refer a Neighbor' campaign to your new pipeline.
Invoice for closed deals to hit $10,000 pure profit.
